zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Cunynghame, 1st Laird of Craigends於1455年出生在南非卡阿普洛文希格倫卡爾時，他的父親Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus30歲，母親Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes31歲。他和Elizabeth Stewart至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Cunynghame, 1st Laird of Craigends于1455年出生在南非卡阿普洛文希格倫卡爾时，他的父亲Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus30岁，母亲Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes31岁。他和Elizabeth Stewart至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cunynghame,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cunningham
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Cunynghame, 1st Laird of Craigends was born in 1455, in Glencairn, Cape Province, South Africa, his father, Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus, was 30 and his mother, Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes, was 31. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Stewart. He died on 9 September 1513, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Cunynghame, 1st Laird of Craigends est né en 1455, à Glencairn, Kaapprovinsie, Afrique du Sud, son père, Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Stewart. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Cunynghame, 1st Laird of Craigends 1455 in Glencairn, Kaapprovinsie, Südafrika geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus 30 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes 31. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Stewart mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Cunynghame, 1st Laird of Craigends è nato il nel 1455 nel Glencairn, Kaapprovinsie, Sudafrica, il suo padre, Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Stewart. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Cunynghame, 1st Laird of Craigendsが1455年に南アフリカカアップロヴィンシグレンケイルンで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmausは30歳，母Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailesは31歳であった。彼はElizabeth Stewartとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Cunynghame, 1st Laird of Craigends(이)가 1455년 남아프리카 카아프로빈시 글렌카언에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Stewart(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Cunynghame, 1st Laird of Craigends nasceu em 1455, em Glencairn, Kaapprovinsie, África do Sul, seu pai, Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Stewart. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Cunynghame, 1st Laird of Craigends родился в 1455 г. в местности гленкеирн, кааппровинси, Южная Африка, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes, 31. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Stewart. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Cunynghame, 1st Laird of Craigends nació en 1455, en Glencairn, Kaapprovinsie, Sudáfrica, su papá, Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Elizabeth Stewart. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
